examples.sentence: Despite the mounting debts, the company kept up an ostrich policy, pretending everything was fine.
examples.translation: Despite the mounting debts, the company kept up an ostrich policy, pretending everything was fine.

examples.sentence: If we continue with an ostrich policy about climate change, the consequences will be severe.
examples.translation: If we continue with an ostrich policy about climate change, the consequences will be severe.

examples.sentence: The government was criticized for its ostrich policy toward the rising unemployment rates last year.
examples.translation: The government was criticized for its ostrich policy toward the rising unemployment rates last year.

examples.sentence: You cannot solve the problem by adopting an ostrich policy and ignoring the facts.
examples.translation: You cannot solve the problem by adopting an ostrich policy and ignoring the facts.

examples.sentence: After working three consecutive night shifts, Sarah felt completely out of spoons and couldn’t take on any extra tasks.
examples.translation: After working three consecutive night shifts, Sarah felt completely out of spoons and couldn’t take on any extra tasks.

examples.sentence: I’m sorry I can’t help you move this weekend; I’m totally out of spoons after a hectic week at work.
examples.translation: I’m sorry I can’t help you move this weekend; I’m totally out of spoons after a hectic week at work.

examples.sentence: When Jake’s stress piled up, he realized he was out of spoons and needed a break before tackling anything else.
examples.translation: When Jake’s stress piled up, he realized he was out of spoons and needed a break before tackling anything else.

examples.sentence: The news of her sudden resignation came out of the blue and shocked everyone in the office.
examples.translation: The news of her sudden resignation came out of the blue and shocked everyone in the office.

examples.sentence: Out of the blue, an old friend called me after years of silence.
examples.translation: Out of the blue, an old friend called me after years of silence.

examples.sentence: The idea for the project arrived out of the blue during our brainstorming session.
examples.translation: The idea for the project arrived out of the blue during our brainstorming session.

examples.sentence: The team was out of the chute with a strong lead, scoring two goals in the first five minutes.
examples.translation: The team was out of the chute with a strong lead, scoring two goals in the first five minutes.

examples.sentence: She hit the ground out of the chute, quickly impressing the new clients with her knowledge.
examples.translation: She hit the ground out of the chute, quickly impressing the new clients with her knowledge.

examples.sentence: If we get out of the chute fast in this campaign, we’ll set the tone for the rest of the year.
examples.translation: If we get out of the chute fast in this campaign, we’ll set the tone for the rest of the year.

examples.sentence: Leaving that stressful job only to start a worse one felt like jumping out of the frying pan, into the fire.
examples.translation: Leaving that stressful job only to start a worse one felt like jumping out of the frying pan, into the fire.

examples.sentence: When Tom switched companies to avoid his difficult boss but found himself under an even stricter manager, it was truly out of the frying pan, into the fire.
examples.translation: When Tom switched companies to avoid his difficult boss but found himself under an even stricter manager, it was truly out of the frying pan, into the fire.

examples.sentence: Trying to fix the leaky roof without experience led us out of the frying pan, into the fire with even more damage.
examples.translation: Trying to fix the leaky roof without experience led us out of the frying pan, into the fire with even more damage.

examples.sentence: The horses galloped out of the gate as the crowd cheered loudly.
examples.translation: The horses galloped out of the gate as the crowd cheered loudly.

examples.sentence: After the ceremony, the guests streamed out of the gate into the garden for refreshments.
examples.translation: After the ceremony, the guests streamed out of the gate into the garden for refreshments.

examples.sentence: She stepped nervously out of the gate, taking her first steps onto the stage.
examples.translation: She stepped nervously out of the gate, taking her first steps onto the stage.

examples.sentence: The children ran out of the gate the moment the school bell rang, eager to start their summer vacation.
examples.translation: The children ran out of the gate the moment the school bell rang, eager to start their summer vacation.

examples.sentence: The racehorse burst out of the gate with incredible speed, leaving its competitors behind.
examples.translation: The racehorse burst out of the gate with incredible speed, leaving its competitors behind.

examples.sentence: Out of the gate, the sprinter took the lead and never looked back.
examples.translation: Out of the gate, the sprinter took the lead and never looked back.

examples.sentence: If your startup gets out of the gate strong, you increase your chances of long-term success.
examples.translation: If your startup gets out of the gate strong, you increase your chances of long-term success.

examples.sentence: The greyhound was out of the gate so quickly that the other dogs struggled to keep up.
examples.translation: The greyhound was out of the gate so quickly that the other dogs struggled to keep up.

examples.sentence: After the restructuring, I felt completely out of the loop and missed critical updates.
examples.translation: After the restructuring, I felt completely out of the loop and missed critical updates.

examples.sentence: Don’t keep me out of the loop on this project; I need to know what’s happening.
examples.translation: Don’t keep me out of the loop on this project; I need to know what’s happening.

examples.sentence: She was out of the loop for weeks because no one informed her about the new policies.

examples.sentence: The palace intrigue during King Henry’s reign involved secret alliances and betrayals among nobles.
examples.translation: The palace intrigue during King Henry’s reign involved secret alliances and betrayals among nobles.

examples.sentence: Historians have uncovered numerous documents revealing palace intrigue that influenced the monarch’s decisions.
examples.translation: Historians have uncovered numerous documents revealing palace intrigue that influenced the monarch’s decisions.

examples.sentence: She was fascinated by the palace intrigue that surrounded the queen’s court in the 18th century.
examples.translation: She was fascinated by the palace intrigue that surrounded the queen’s court in the 18th century.

examples.sentence: The movie vividly depicts palace intrigue as various factions vie for the throne.
examples.translation: The movie vividly depicts palace intrigue as various factions vie for the throne.

examples.sentence: The constant palace politics made it difficult for any advisor to have a stable position in the court.
examples.translation: The constant palace politics made it difficult for any advisor to have a stable position in the court.

examples.sentence: During the Renaissance, palace politics often dictated who gained favor with the ruling family.
examples.translation: During the Renaissance, palace politics often dictated who gained favor with the ruling family.

examples.sentence: The ambassador quickly learned to navigate the palace politics to succeed in his diplomatic mission.
examples.translation: The ambassador quickly learned to navigate the palace politics to succeed in his diplomatic mission.

examples.sentence: Despite her talents, she fell victim to palace politics and was sidelined from power.
examples.translation: Despite her talents, she fell victim to palace politics and was sidelined from power.

examples.sentence: His performance at the regional meet paled in comparison to the national champion’s impressive results.
examples.translation: His performance at the regional meet paled in comparison to the national champion’s impressive results.

examples.sentence: When you see the new artwork, your previous paintings will pale in comparison.
examples.translation: When you see the new artwork, your previous paintings will pale in comparison.

examples.sentence: The local bakery’s pastries pale in comparison to those made by the famous patisserie downtown.
examples.translation: The local bakery’s pastries pale in comparison to those made by the famous patisserie downtown.

examples.sentence: Their modest house paled in comparison to the luxurious mansions in the neighborhood.
examples.translation: Their modest house paled in comparison to the luxurious mansions in the neighborhood.

examples.sentence: In the ancient manuscript, the pale rider symbolizes the inevitability of death approaching the kingdom.
examples.translation: In the ancient manuscript, the pale rider symbolizes the inevitability of death approaching the kingdom.

examples.sentence: Artists often depict the pale rider as a ghostly figure on a pale horse, representing the apocalypse.
examples.translation: Artists often depict the pale rider as a ghostly figure on a pale horse, representing the apocalypse.

examples.sentence: The legend says the pale rider will return in times of great turmoil and war.
examples.translation: The legend says the pale rider will return in times of great turmoil and war.

examples.sentence: The novel’s climax features the arrival of the pale rider, signaling the end of an era.
